execution_environment.execution_rule: After you form a plan for the analysis, execute that plan in Galaxy.

user_prompt: I have three files from a single-cell experiment and I want to use Galaxy to cluster cells and visualize marker genes, but I am not sure how to do it. Please find the right Galaxy approach, run it, and report what normalization tool was used, how many tool steps were in the workflow, and which genes appear in the dotplot.
